title: leontodon hastilis subsp. glabratus
intro: Leontodon hastilis subsp. glabratus, also known as smooth hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leontodon hastilis subsp. glabratus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
